summary:
POLITICAL AND GLOBAL LEADERS VISIONS: Brandon shares his visions regarding political figures, starting with a scene of Donald Trump in a black tuxedo at a formal gathering holding a crystal goblet with gold trim. Brandon describes seeing Trump consume something from the cup and subsequently suffering a heart attack, prompting him to warn about upcoming gatherings. Brandon then discusses a meeting at the White House involving Elon Musk and a prince, asserting that Musk will develop the communication infrastructure for the Mark of the Beast using Starlink satellites to connect with global microchips. He also mentions an acceleration of end-time agreements, specifically referencing a trillion-dollar deal, peace talks, a two-state solution, the Abraham Accords, and the involvement of Zelensky.

MEXICO CORRUPTION AND CARTEL ALLEGATIONS: Brandon recounts claims regarding the President of Mexico, Claudia Sheinbaum, asserting she has deep ties with cartels and narco-politicians. He references a Fox News interview with Mexican Senator Lilly Téllez, who describes Mexico as a narco-state facing a crisis involving fentanyl and migrants, and claims the Mexican government protects cartels while aligning with dictators in Venezuela and Cuba. Brandon shares previous visions of mules coming from Cuba and Venezuela, alleging dark witchcraft and corruption tied to the Mexican government.

TRAFFICKING AND DOMESTIC CONCERNS: Brandon details a vision of underground tunnels along the border wall used for trafficking children through California and distributing them to parts of Asia, alleging that Gavin Newsom is intentionally ignoring the situation. He also recalls a past vision about a grotesque, new sexually transmitted disease spreading from Canada that causes severe genital infections. Additionally, Brandon expresses concern over a news clip showing an undocumented immigrant in Illinois who was hired as a police officer and authorized to carry a firearm on duty despite not being a citizen, framing this as an example of government corruption in blue states.

DIVINE VISIONS OF EUROPE AND HARVEST: Brandon describes a detailed vision of Jesus wearing a robe and playing a drum while walking through a valley in Europe, specifically Sweden. He recounts seeing Jesus knocking on the doors of old cottages, inviting people to follow Him. While some people eagerly joined a growing line behind Him, others ignored the knocking, causing Jesus to patiently wait before moving on. The path was made of cobblestone and lined with blooming daffodils that bowed down as Jesus passed. Brandon states that Jesus traveled through Europe, the Middle East, Africa, South America, and America, seeking followers for an end-time army, which he associates with a coming global harvest and spiritual revival.

APOCALYPTIC JUDGMENT AND DESTRUCTION: Brandon outlines a catastrophic vision involving massive destruction across the United States and the world. He describes a tsunami heading toward Miami, a path of destruction stretching to Los Angeles, and the oceans polluted with a red sludge filled with billions of dead sea creatures. The stench of decaying fish caused diseases across islands like Haiti, Jamaica, and Hawaii. In the vision, Mark Zuckerberg was seen hiding in a bunker, while other people sought refuge in caves. Brandon observed widespread drought, farmers facing famine, skies filled with smoke and ash from global volcanoes, and New York burning with fire.

THE FOUR ANGELS AND THE HORN: Brandon details seeing four massive angels, estimated to be hundreds of stories tall, standing in the ocean to the east. He describes their bodies and clothing as being made entirely of varying shades of dark rain, giving them depth and the appearance of wearing hooded cloaks without visible facial features. A massive waterfall continuously poured from their chests into the sea, causing a violent disturbance in the water. The southernmost angel raised a long golden pipe and blew a deafening blast that sounded like thunder or a freight train. This caused a global earthquake, fulfilling what Brandon describes as the great and terrible day of the Lord, with the earth rocking violently and leaving no place for people to hide.

FUTURE TECHNOLOGICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon clarifies his interpretation of the Book of Revelation, comparing biblical descriptions of locusts and scorpions to modern technology. He claims to have seen a vision of tens of thousands of buzzing drones swarming the sky, which he believes are the tools the Antichrist will use to track the human race. Brandon asserts that historical biblical figures lacked the vocabulary to describe future technological advancements like drones, microchips, and satellite networks, and he firmly links these modern inventions to the fulfillment of apocalyptic events.
rawData: [November 20, 2025]-[Going over Last prayer video]-[https://youtu.be/Ez7SesrR7vs]-[Well, good evening, family. Early morning, almost, for a lot of you. I'm going to go over some of the things the Lord showed me in the last prayer video. Was that something else? When I have those experiences and I'm able to see like that, they forever change my life. When you see the Father and His heart for the people, and there's just so much love and compassion that He has for every single one of us. I love my sweatshirt—Diana got it for me. Isn't Jesus wonderful? I told her, 'Thanks, babe.' She got that for me from church. So, let's just go over the things the Lord has been showing us in prayer. I want Braden to play this video, but let me pray over the atmosphere. I need to pray. Father, I thank You, Lord, for Your angelic host. I thank You, Lord, that they're watching over me. They're protecting me, Father, as I do my live stream. Thank You, Lord, that it's all to Jesus. We surrender all to Him. We freely give. And we thank You, Father, for Your presence on this live stream tonight. Father, we enter into Your throne room boldly. I know it's late, Lord, but there's no time limit in the spirit realm. And I know it's more active in the night than a lot of times in the day, it seems. And Father, I thank You, Lord, for this time. I ask You, Father, that it would bless the people and they would be refreshed and uplifted and they would walk away changed, never the same, in Jesus' name—uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. And God, we give You the glory, honor, and praise. I want to show you what happened last night. This is not a coincidence. This is a big deal. And am I saying it's this event? No. But I think there are never any coincidences. I'm just going to tell you there are very strong similarities to what I saw in the spirit concerning Trump and what happened last night. And as we have prayed for President Trump, I believe the fervent prayer of the righteous availeth much. I want you to see this that Braden made. I'm so proud of him. He works so hard. So I want you to play this, buddy, and show them what we prayed over and what we saw in the spirit and then what happened last night. I see this glass that looks like it has gold at the top. There's gold at the top of this glass. That's actual real gold. It's like a golden glass goblet—like crystal. Fine crystal. I see chandeliers. He's wearing a black tie. He's wearing a black tuxedo again. He has something in his hand; looks like a drink. Men are in black tuxedos. They're all dressed up very nice. We pray protection over President Trump, over every party, over every get-together, any kind of celebration. You said we could eat or drink any deadly thing and it would not harm us. All I saw was a cup with the gold, and I saw the drink and I saw the food and I saw the party and I saw everybody dressed up. And then I saw him taking it to his lips. And then I saw him having a massive heart attack. And the Lord said, 'Pray over his food. Pray over his drink. Pray over the parties. Pray over him as he has these get-togethers.' So, instantaneously you can add to it and say, 'Well, they're probably going to try to poison him.' I don't know; that's not what the Lord said. All I saw was a cup with the gold, the drink, the food, the party, and everyone dressed up, and then I saw him taking it to his lips and then he went down. So we see the gold cup. I just thought it was pretty interesting because the prince was there, and what have I told you about that man and what have I said so many times? He's going to come out very strong in the days ahead and he will become a big leader concerning the two-state solution and the things that will bring about the end. Why do I believe this man that was at the White House that had a trillion-dollar deal with the United States of America? That's very interesting. I said he will come out very strong in the days ahead. Braden hasn't had time to make that video, but I've spoken it so many times. I've warned you about this man. So, who else was at the party last night? Very interesting that he would come out of the woodwork as I've told you—he is a rat. He's right there, folks. And what did I tell you he does? He met the prince for the first time last night. They're all buddies. Donald Trump introduced him, 'Hey, look at my friend over here, Elon.' You know, one of the richest men in the world. And I said Elon will create the communication to the mark of the beast, which is called Starlink. When I went to tribulation with the Lord, I told you all that the drones fly all around the world and they communicate not with 5G but with satellites, with Starlink, because there's no 5G all over the place and it's going to be global. That man right there, which is Elon Musk, is meeting the prince, who I believe, in my opinion from what I believe the Lord has showed me, is the Antichrist. And that man right there next to him will be his helper. A thousand people said, 'Brandon, is Elon Musk the Antichrist?' I said no, but he's buddies with him. He will create the beast system with the chip and with the Starlink that communicates to the chip and the chip communicates to the satellite. All of it is internet; it's all going to be part of the end-time thing. But they're becoming friends all of a sudden, shaking hands, bumping fists. I'm waiting for these moments, but it happened to be on the night that he would be at the White House making a trillion-dollar deal and all this is going on and they're talking about a two-state solution, talking about how we've got to have peace. The Abraham Accords and the Lord said, 'Brandon, you're going to see an acceleration of end-time events coming in the days ahead.' That was a couple weeks ago. And it will be an acceleration of things. Agreements will be made. And here we see agreements being made. What was said, do you think, behind closed doors? If we could just be a fly on the wall, what was said privately? Then we see Zelensky come out and the army saying, 'Hey, we need to have meetings over here. We need to talk about peace, too.' And all the things. We've prayed against the Tomahawk missiles. We've prayed against the escalation of war. We keep interceding for things. But as we see all this stuff rapidly changing, folks, I'm trying to tell you as loud as I can—and people go, 'Brandon, you discourage me because you're talking about 2028 or 2029. You're praying about these time frames.' Folks, it is a blink of an eye. We're about to enter into 2026 in just five or seven weeks. We have no time left of this year. This year is gone, 2025. And so, we're entering into 2026. Even sister Billy, when I talked to her today, she said, 'What's the Lord talking about for 2026, Brandon?' We're praying over things; she's talking about what the Lord's showing her and what they're believing God for. You know, you've got to start now. We cannot just wait until what I believe is 2028. Right now is the harvest time. It's time for the church to wake up. God gives the church time and time again, but they're asleep. He knows what it takes to get people motivated. Major events happen a lot, like we saw with Charlie Kirk back in August or September. It takes a lot to turn a cruise ship. It takes a lot to turn things, and that's what we're doing right now through prayer. This is a very serious time. I see these events taking place at the White House with everything I saw in the visions, and the Lord said, "Donald Trump must finish his race. I have much for him to do. You must pray for his safety. You must pray for his health, for there are assignments on his life." There are assignments and a list of people from MS-13 and the cartel and all the darkness that we've talked about, with them saying that they want to make a hit list on all these major politicians and judges and all their evil schemes. But as I was speaking and talking about the president of Mexico, Claudia—I warned you about Claudia and I said she is deep in with the cartel. That's how they get to the top—never mind, it doesn't matter. I try to be as tactful as I can; I have children watching. But what I'm trying to tell you all is the Lord said people don't just get to the top down there. This is something very dark. But I want to show you what this woman has—this woman has guts. This woman has a backbone like a crowbar. She's standing for her nation. I don't know who she is, but she's on Fox News. And she has a target on her now because of what she's about to tell you. I want you to play this. I want you to know this is what I was seeing. Remember what I told you. Cuba and Venezuela—those two countries for sure—the Lord said mules are coming from there, and there are alliances with Mexico concerning the cartel and major corruption with finances that involve the Mexican government, and this involved Santeria, and it was a dark witchcraft over the nation. The Lord said, "I'm going to shake these nations and I'm going to bring a great revival in Venezuela and Cuba, and I'm going to liberate my people just like I did to the children of Israel." If you will just believe, the greatest revival we've ever seen is about to take place in South America, Africa, across the globe. We'll get into that even more in just a bit. But I want you to hear what this woman says that put a target on her back. This is serious. So go ahead and play that, baby. The president of Mexico is furious. She's calling Mexican Senator Lilly Téllez a traitor for coming on Fox News with me a few days ago and saying this: "Listen, the help from the United States to fight the cartels in Mexico is absolutely welcome. And that is how the majority of Mexicans feel. The only ones who don't like that President Trump is sending help and trying to support Mexicans against the cartels are the narco-politicians. That includes President Sheinbaum." Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum responded, saying, "It's not a minor issue that a senator gave an interview to a foreign media outlet calling for intervention." Here to discuss is that Mexican Senator Lilly Téllez. Senator Téllez, welcome to Fox News. I'm just going to get right to it. Is Mexico a narco-state? "Yes, it is. And we all Mexicans know about it. And Mexicans are afraid of the alliance between the Mexican government and the cartels that have infested our nation." Can you explain this alliance between the president, her party, the Morena party, and the cartels? "Yes. The party has financed—the cartels have given so much money to these narco-politicians of Morena to get into office to get the power. So the Mexican government protects the cartels. That is why President Sheinbaum doesn't want the strong American leadership to help Mexico defeat the cartels. And also Sheinbaum doesn't want the rest of the world to know what is happening here in Mexico. We are on the steps to be the next Venezuela. She is aligned with Venezuela's dictator with Cuba, and we are losing our country. They have destroyed our republican institutions, the democratic state. I think we all Mexicans want and welcome the support of the United States to assist Mexican people against the cartels that have us all in this crisis with the traffic on fentanyl and migrants." Her response to this—and I know this because her spokesperson came on our show in response to your interview—and they say, "Well, we just turned over 26 cartel members. We're working." It's good enough. You get the point. This is exactly what we've been seeing before any of this came out, before the uprising and protesting. We saw this as a family way before. And the Lord keeps saying, "Watch Cuba. Watch Cuba in the days ahead. Watch Venezuela. Watch these places because there's mules coming from these places." I saw even biological things coming in the middle of the night. Remember, does anybody remember the dragon that was purple, a light purple, a lavender, and it had white around its eyes, and it came up out of the water three times? This is symbolic. These are the things that I know the Lord is speaking about that are in code, that are metaphors. He's warning about something, kind of like the flowers that we'll talk about in a little bit. Folks, this is exactly why we're called to pray. This is somebody who has guts. She's bold to stand against the cartel and warn about what's going on with the corruption in her government because she's in danger. So we need to pray for her safety. It's serious. This is a very serious issue that the Lord has showed us about the smuggling and the trafficking of children. And the Lord showed us underground tunnels on the border wall with children coming up through California, and Gavin turning his head toward it like he didn't care because he knew it was going on, but they're just going to turn a blind eye to it. And the Lord said, "These children are being trafficked through California, going up the highway, the coast all the way up, and I saw them being distributed even out into Japan and other parts of Asia." Do you remember that? Does anybody remember that? I know we see a lot. The Lord is so gracious to us. He's so wonderful that he would show us the things he does to warn us of that which is to come, and we see it in part. We hear in part. I'm not saying I see everything. But isn't Jesus wonderful for what he does show us? And we know that they are smuggling these kids for pedophilia rings and all kinds of things. The Lord told us there's this darkness, and he said that there was a brand new STD coming on the scene that would make people eunuchs, and a grave infection would set in and would cause them to rot in their genitals. And it would be grotesque and very painful for what's about to take place. For he said, "You've touched the children and I'm done with this. And there will be a new transmitted—" And I saw it spreading through Canada. I saw it spreading through places. Does anybody remember that? And it was vile. What the Lord showed me was vile. It looked disgusting. And I just want to warn you all that's not changed. That was back in March, I believe, when the Lord showed us all this stuff. And here we see somebody very important standing and saying the exact same thing that we heard from the spirit of God clear back in the spring of this year. All right. So there's that part of it. Was there anything else you want to show? No, I don't think so. All right. You sure? I sure love you, buddy. We had this guy right here. Remember, he was saying that he became a cop or something and then he didn't have to have a license. I want to show you one more thing that I think is just crazy. This is a man that is an illegal immigrant who has come to our country. You see, if you come over illegally, it's illegal for a reason because we have laws of the land. So this man right here, I want you to see this little clip. This is alarming. This is the stuff that's going on—the corruption in our government, the corruption in the blue states. What happened in Illinois? This is important. You all need to know this stuff's going on. Go ahead and play this. So, how long have you been a police officer? Since January 8th. Just to confirm though, they hired you and you had work authorization, correct? And you were able to carry a firearm? No. On duty? Yes. Off duty? No. Location. So on duty you could carry a firearm. In the state of Illinois, you need a FOID and a CCW to carry a weapon off duty. But on duty you could. Correct. Wow. You know what's crazy about this is I don't know anything about him other than he says he loves America. The problem is he's not even a citizen. So he can't own a firearm legally in our country. But he's being given a firearm by the state of Illinois as a police officer. And apparently, all you have to have is work authorization. That is insane. You haven't even sworn allegiance to our country yet, and yet we're giving you a firearm. Now this guy may be a great guy, but how many others are working in our country as police officers who aren't great guys? I don't know if that bothers you, but it bothered me. That's insanity to me. You're giving somebody that can't even legally buy a firearm a badge and a gun and telling him he can be a police officer in our country, and he's not even a legal citizen. He just got over here and he said, 'I started in January.' Now he's been a police officer all this time. And I'm thinking, you're arresting people. I don't know. Does that just bother me? Did anybody else know this kind of stuff's going on? It's just interesting to me. I don't try to be a drama person, but I try to bring light to the darkness that's going on in our nation and why we are called to pray as a family. The importance of us coming together and assembling ourselves on this channel and praying for the nations, praying for that which is to come. Now, I'm going to hurry because I've already been 20 minutes. So, let's go over this last vision. Does anybody want to talk about what I saw? That was a 'wow'. As we were praying at the end of the broadcast, I felt in my spirit to keep praying. I just felt inside the Lord wasn't done. But as we kept pushing, I went over and I started going into a different kind of a tongue. And the Lord told me, 'I'm going to start to work with you with interpretation of tongues, and it will start out small, and it will grow and grow, and you'll understand when it's at a full manifestation. You'll understand everything in detail of what you're praying in the spirit just by hearing it.' And it will be like you press in and the Lord reveals and I hear the words—I hear what he's saying in my spirit. But in this, when I'm praying in the spirit, he said, 'You'll start to interpret all of it.' But as I was praying two days ago, I saw Jesus and he was wearing a beautiful robe like he always does, but he had a drum around his neck and he started drumming like a drummer boy. But he was drumming the drum and it was like a cry to come. Last time it was a horn and his voice turned into a horn, but this time it was making a noise like a drum. But he was marching with it and he went up to the first house and he was in Sweden. The Lord said, 'I'm in Europe.' I saw it was in Europe. And as the Lord would go to the houses, he went to each individual home and he was knocking on the door of the heart of the individual and he was inviting them to follow him. 'Will you follow me? Will you be a part of this end-time army?' And as he would knock on the door, the people would open the door and they would be so excited to see that it was the Lord. I saw these old cottages with old wooden doors and Jesus would summon them, 'Come follow me, come follow me.' And they would get in line, one after another, and he went to each door and he was walking through this valley of life with green grass all around. I could see at the top of the mountains—the mountains were massive like the Swiss Alps, massive, beautiful snow-capped mountains. And he was walking through this valley, but there were houses all along the way. And Jesus would go up and knock on each and every single door. Now, some of the doors that he walked up to looked dilapidated. The shutters on the house were falling off. They looked like the hinges were broken. There were cobwebs in the corners. The lights weren't on in the house. And as he knocked on the house, no one would answer. So he looked around and looked at the house and he glanced at the eaves. He glanced at everything. And I saw him looking. He was looking at the ground and he was waiting patiently and no one would come to the door and all of a sudden he turned away and just kept on marching. He kept beating his drum. And as he went to each house, the people would line up behind him. Some of them had shorts and overalls on that were German, and I don't remember the name of them, but these people had nice cut hair and they were all excited. Some of them had bigger bellies than others, like all of us. Lederhosen? Lederhosen. Thanks. They were wearing those because he was going through Europe. I don't even know if people still wear that. Isn't it neat? But as he was walking on the path, it looked like a yellow brick road, but it wasn't. It was cobblestone. And I could see each stone was beautifully cut as he was walking through this valley. There were flowers and daffodils on the side of the road. And there were patches of them and they were all beautifully blooming and so beautiful. And as he walked down the path, the flowers would bow down before him. And all the flowers would lay prostrate on the ground, and then as he walked by, they all raised back up. But as our King Jesus walked by, even the flowers would bow down before our Father. You know the Bible says that if we don't praise him, the rocks will cry out. But I know that all creation gives praise to our King—the birds of the air, the lily of the valley. He is the lily of the valley. He is the fairest of ten thousand. And as I saw the waterfalls falling off the cliffs and the mountains and the snow caps because it looked like it was turning into spring, the Lord said, 'I want you to pay attention to these flowers for it is symbolic of something.' He said, 'Look into it.' So I've had so many people try to help. What does the daffodil represent? This is a representation of spring coming. The Holy Ghost is telling me a great harvest is coming. As I saw the people marching through the valley, joining up with Jesus in a single file line, following our friend, following our king, our maker, as he was going through the valley. As I watched him, he went all through Europe to each place. Then he went through the Middle East, down through Africa, through South America, and through America. He went around and was knocking on every one of our hearts: 'Will you let me in? Will you accept me as Lord and Savior?' But he was a gentleman about it. He waited a little bit. He looked around to see if the person would answer the door, but he didn't force his way in. He didn't knock the door down and say, 'You're getting saved, buddy. Get out here. Come on. We're going.' He waited patiently to see if they would answer. But as he waited, he sat there with expectation on his face. 'Will you just let me in? I want to be your savior. I want you to follow me. Come follow me.' I figured this is how he did it with the disciples. 'Come follow me. I'll make you a fisher of men. Come follow me, Matthew.' And as he would go through the towns and the places, the disciples followed him. 'Will you be a disciple of Jesus Christ?' That's what I believe that vision was. It was so beautiful and so detailed. It changed me. But as it kept going, I heard, 'Woe, woe, woe, America. Woe, woe, woe, Miami. Woe, woe, woe, Los Angeles.' I saw a tsunami wave coming. I saw great destruction coming. There was an arrow that went from Miami all the way across the country to Los Angeles. As I was looking into this vision that the Lord was allowing me to see, I saw dead fish everywhere. I have never seen anything like this before. The very waters were all polluted with a red sludge. There were so many dead fish, whales, octopus—all of it. Everything was floating on the top. Disgusting. All dead. It was as far as the eye could see. It wasn't just on the shoreline, but they were dead all throughout the water. The water was littered with dead fish. I don't think any of them were alive. In the vision, I saw islands: Haiti, Jamaica, Grand Cayman, all of them. I was looking toward the south-southeast. As I was looking down, I could see the people, and there was so much stench and a raw flesh smell. People were so sick on those islands because of all the dead fish. It was causing disease and the smell. You could smell it in the vision. That's how tangible this vision was. I could see the dead fish washing on the shore, and the government didn't know what to do with them. People didn't know what to do because they were all washing in and you couldn't control it. There were literally hundreds of millions, if not billions, of dead fish everywhere—even Hawaii, Honolulu. I saw it all over. Then I saw Mark Zuckerberg, but his hair was a lot puffier. He was down in a bunker in the middle of the island. He was down in a fraidy hole, like a silo. I could see lights on around him. But as I panned across, the Lord allowed me to see people hiding in caves. I heard, 'The great and terrible day of the Lord.' Suddenly, I saw farmers, and they had their overalls, but all the land was not producing. There was great drought and famine. I could see them looking toward the south and the east, but they had a discouragement upon their faces like, 'What are we going to do?' As I looked to the sky, I saw the sky all around us was on fire. There was smoke and ash and flame in the air from volcanoes that were going off everywhere. I could see the smoke blotting out the sun, but the sun was trying to shine through. The ground was charred. Something looked wrong with the ground in this vision. As I looked to the east, I saw four massive angels in the water. I saw a massive waterfall coming out of the belly of the angels, pouring into the water below. The water was going into the oceans. Their skin was not skin; it looked like rain. You know whenever you see rain falling in the distance, and you can see blue streaks in the sky? That's the way the skin looked on these angels. There was no real tangibility; it was all rain, but there was an outline. The entire being of the angel was rain, a storm, and there was a major waterfall coming out of them, pouring into the ocean. I knew they were angels. Their faces had no features—it was just black around their eyes. You could get lost in that darkness. I've never seen anything like it. I saw one angel take a long pipe from his hand and put it to his lips. As he blew into this horn-looking thing, I said, 'It doesn't look like a ram's horn, like a shofar.' It was a long piece of golden pipe. As he blew into it, the whole earth shook. Not just one place had an earthquake, but as he blew into this horn, all of the earth shook at once. I heard the scripture: 'The earth will rock and reel like a drunkard.' The whole earth was trembling. He said, 'There will be no place to hide to escape the wrath to come, son. For they will hide in the caves and in their ditches, and they will not get away from the wrath which is to come. For this is the great and terrible day of the Lord.' As I looked across, I could see all of New York burning with fire. I could see a tsunami wave rushing into Miami. I could see all of the volcanoes in Hawaii going off at once. It was mass destruction. The whole earth was shaking violently, and they were wanting to hide in the caves and the rocks. They were fearful, but there was nothing they could do because the judgment was set. Dead fish were everywhere. There were no birds flying in the air because of the smoke. The grass was charred; everything looked burned up. I looked around at those farmers in their overalls, and they were very worried. This really bothered me. I didn't want to do a livestream last night. I told Diana, 'I'm going to meditate on this more and pray. Don't be so quick to make videos.' I had to process what I'd seen. I saw those angels and they really tripped me out. Diana said, 'I want to read Revelation to you, chapter 8.' She said there were four angels, and seven altogether, but four first and then three for a later time. And she goes, "Do you think this is what you were seeing, honey?" I said, "I don't know, babe. All I know is I saw these angels blowing these horns and all this stuff going on." She goes, "Do you think it was the four coming out of the Euphrates River because they were water?" So, I don't know. All I know is that I am in awe. I'm in awe that God would allow me to see something like that. I thought it was really cool about the souls and all this stuff, but when I saw all this stuff happening with the sea again—the sea—and then the seas and the waves will roar. Remember that? And it was above the water; it was a sound. It wasn't that they were moving; it was deafeningly loud as the angel blew his horn. It was something upon the water.
